{{#if (isdefined this.address)}} {{#each (toArray this.address)}} {{#if @first}}
{{#if (isdefined this.name)}} {{this.name}}
{{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.streetAddress)}} {{this.streetAddress}}
{{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.addressLocality)}} {{this.addressLocality}}{{#if (isdefined this.addressRegion)}}, {{/if}} {{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.addressRegion)}} {{this.addressRegion}} {{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.addressRegion)}}
{{else}} {{#if (isdefined this.addressLocality)}}
{{/if}} {{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.addressCountry)}} {{this.addressCountry}}
{{/if}} {{#if (isdefined this.postalCode)}} {{this.postalCode}}
{{/if}}
{{/if}} {{/each}} {{/if}}
